coreMeaning.en: a forward or backward roll of the body

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: 来自法语 soubresaut（跳跃），somer(上)+sault(跳) → 翻筋斗

coreMeaning.cn: 某时；将来某个时候；曾经

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: some(某)+what(什么) → 有几分；有点

coreMeaning.en: in, at, or to some unspecified place
a wine steward in a restaurant

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: 来自法语，somme(驮运)+ier → 原指驮运货物者，后演变为餐厅侍酒师

coreMeaning.en: to walk while asleep; to sleepwalk

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: somn(睡)+ambul(走)+ate → 睡着走路 → 梦游
somni(睡)+fer(带来)+ous → 带来睡意的 → 催眠的

coreMeaning.en: the act of talking in one's sleep

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: somni(睡)+loqu(说话)+y → 睡中说话 → 梦话

coreMeaning.en: a strong desire for sleep; sleepiness

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: somn(睡)+olence → 睡意浓厚的状态

coreMeaning.en: in a sleepy or drowsy manner
a system for detecting objects underwater using sound waves

morphemes.meaning: 导航与测距（首字母缩写）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: sonar = Sound Navigation And Ranging，声波导航

coreMeaning.en: a musical composition for one or two instruments

morphemes.meaning: 意大利语女性名词后缀

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: son(声)+ata → 声音之作 → 奏鸣曲

morphemes.meaning: 小型（意大利语指小后缀）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: song → 来自古英语 sang，联想sing(唱)的名词形式

coreMeaning.en: a bird with a musical song

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: song(歌)+bird(鸟) → 唱歌的鸟 → 鸣禽

coreMeaning.en: birds known for their musical songs
a book containing a collection of songs
a male child in relation to his parents

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: son → 联想sun(太阳)，儿子如同父母的太阳

coreMeaning.en: of or denoting a voiced sound

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: son(声)+ant → 有声音的 → 有声的

coreMeaning.en: relating to or characterized by sleepwalking
the Roman god of sleep; sleep itself

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Somnus → 罗马睡神，对应希腊神话的Hypnos
